overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a gritty urban environment. The player moves from a muddy encampment area littered with trash, past palm trees and a roadside billboard, along a wet sidewalk adjacent to traffic, toward a massive stadium structure built into rocky cliffs. The overcast dusk lighting creates a moody atmosphere with wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy encampment path with trash piles and makeshift seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a muddy path littered with trash bags and cardboard debris

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at small kiosk with pink neon signage

entered.detail: large pile of blue and white garbage bags stacked on the muddy ground
tall palm trees lining the left side of the path
white concrete benches with people sitting on them
small green kiosk with bright pink neon signage and a person standing inside
tall digital advertising screen displaying colorful animated content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow muddy path through an urban encampment area. Blue trash bags pile up on the right while people sit on concrete benches to the left. Palm trees line the path, and a small vendor stall with pink neon lighting appears ahead on the right. The ground is wet and littered with cardboard and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside sidewalk with adjacent multi-lane traffic

events.description: exits muddy encampment path onto paved roadside sidewalk next to moving traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk parallel to a busy road with cars passing by

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rocky cliff face forming the backdrop
massive modern stadium built into the cliff with large white 'A' logo visible
multi-lane road with cars and trucks moving in both directions

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the muddy path to a paved sidewalk alongside a busy road. The camera passes a pedestrian in a yellow jacket while cars drive by on the left. A massive stadium structure built into a rocky cliff becomes visible in the distance, and the digital billboard now looms large on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with stadium approach and commercial buildings

events.description: slight turn to navigate around other pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians with the stadium growing larger ahead

notable_agents.action: large man in brown vest and shorts walking ahead then moving aside

entered.detail: traditional-style green buildings with curved roofs on the right side
large green dumpsters and trash bins lined along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the wet sidewalk with the stadium structure growing larger in the distance. Traditional green buildings appear on the right side, and various pedestrians walk in both directions. Large trash bins line the right side of the path as the camera approaches the intersection near the stadium.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection plaza at stadium entrance with crosswalk

events.description: enters open plaza intersection area with crosswalk markings and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk area near the stadium entrance with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians in colorful clothing crossing the plaza

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
wide paved plaza area with crosswalk markings leading toward the stadium

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide plaza intersection at the base of the stadium. The camera approaches a crosswalk with traffic lights visible on the left. Groups of pedestrians cross the open paved area, and the green traditional buildings now stand prominently on the right. The massive stadium structure dominates the left side of the view as the camera enters the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, muddy encampment toward a massive stadium structure embedded in rocky cliffs. It begins on a narrow path littered with debris and blue trash bags, passing by concrete benches and a pink neon vendor stall under the shade of palm trees. As the terrain shifts from mud to a paved sidewalk, the camera moves past pedestrians and flowing traffic while a large digital billboard looms on the right and the distant stadium comes into view. The scene then expands along the wet walkway, passing green traditional buildings and large trash bins as the stadium grows increasingly dominant in the skyline. Finally, the camera enters a wide plaza intersection, crossing a paved open area with traffic lights and groups of pedestrians at the base of the towering cliffside structure.
